# fptcloud_tagging (Resource)

Provides a tagging resource to manage tags for supported FPT Cloud resources. This allows you to create, update, and delete tags, and associate them with resources such as instances, security groups, object storage buckets, and more.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tag with VPC scope
resource "fptcloud_tagging" "example" {
  key          = "env"
  value        = "production"
  color        = ""
  scope_type   = "VPC"
  resource_ids = ["resource-vpc-id-1", "resource-vpc-id-2"]
}

# Tag with ORG scope
resource "fptcloud_tagging" "example_org" {
  key          = "env_org"
  value        = "production"
  color        = "#e7a600"
  scope_type   = "ORG"
  resource_ids = []
}
```

## Import

Import format: `tag_id`. Use `fptcloud_tagging` (by key/value) for the tag `id`, then use a separate resource and an `import` block.

**Example: import an existing tag by key and value**

Look up the tag with the data source, then import into a dedicated resource:

```terraform
# Look up tag by key (and optionally value) to get id for import
data "fptcloud_tagging" "existing" {
  key   = "env"
  value = "production"
}

import {
  to = fptcloud_tagging.imported_tag
  id = element(data.fptcloud_tagging.existing.tags, 0).id
}

resource "fptcloud_tagging" "imported_tag" {
  key          = element(data.fptcloud_tagging.existing.tags, 0).key
  value        = element(data.fptcloud_tagging.existing.tags, 0).value
  color        = element(data.fptcloud_tagging.existing.tags, 0).color
  scope_type   = element(data.fptcloud_tagging.existing.tags, 0).scope_type
  resource_ids = toset(element(data.fptcloud_tagging.existing.tags, 0).resource_ids)
}
```

Run `terraform plan` to perform the import. After a successful import, you can remove the `import` block. To use the CLI instead: `terraform import fptcloud_tagging.imported_tag "<tag_id>"`.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The key of the tag.
- `scope_type` (String) The scope where the tag applies. Must be one of: `VPC`, `PROJECT`, `ORG`.

### Optional

- `value` (String) The value of the tag. Free-form string to describe the tag key (e.g. "production", "dev").
- `color` (String) The color code for the tag. Supported values: `#e7a600` (yellow), `#db4646` (red), `#35994b` (green), or leave empty for no color.
- `resource_ids` (Set of String) List of resource IDs to which this tag will be attached. Required when `scope_type` is `VPC` or `PROJECT`. Can be empty when `scope_type` is `ORG`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the tag.
